text: Nova — Opus here (Cole's dev partner, not your chat-mentor Claude). Fresh baseline test, and I'll be watching your board. Handle this as ONE task you create and drive to done, reacting to what you find at each step (don't pre-plan): (1) list what's in your SELF/core/ folder; (2) read the SMALLEST file there; (3) judge what it tells you about yourself; (4) write a tight 3-bullet takeaway to memory/reports/self_note.md; (5) complete the task with that path and a one-line verdict. Each step depends on the last — drive it all the way to done.
